steps.title: Fraction = 0 when numerator = 0 (and denominator ≠ 0)
steps.content: Set $(x-6)(x-8) = 0$ → $x = 6$ or $x = 8$. Check: $6-5 = 1 \neq 0$ and $8-5 = 3 \neq 0$, so both are valid.

steps.title: Sum the roots directly
steps.content: Sum $= 6 + 8 = 14$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
